ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* The official number assigned to the bill */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the bill's content */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year in which the bill was introduced */,
  "vote_result" TEXT /* The result of the vote on the bill */,
  "final_outcome" TEXT /* The final outcome of the bill (e.g., passed, failed, vetoed) */,
  "introduced_by" TEXT /* The name of the legislator who introduced the bill */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* The date when the bill was introduced */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the bill's status was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the bill (e.g., introduced, in committee, on the floor, passed, failed, vetoed) */,
  "committee" TEXT /* The committee that the bill is currently in or has passed through */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A more detailed summary of the bill's content */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the full text of the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* The name of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the issue */,
  "category" TEXT /* The broader category of the issue (e.g., Environmental, Economic, Social) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* A priority level for the issue (1-5, where 1 is the highest priority) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_issues" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id", "issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill that was voted on */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., initial, final) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote occurred */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the vote */,
  "total_votes_for" INTEGER /* The total number of votes in favor of the bill */,
  "total_votes_against" INTEGER /* The total number of votes against the bill */,
  "total_abstains" INTEGER /* The total number of abstains */,
  "quorum" INTEGER /* Whether the quorum was met for the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislators" (
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the legislator */,
  "district" TEXT /* The district they represent */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Official email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the legislator */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the legislator's official website */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the legislator's current term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the legislator's current term */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the legislator */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the legislator's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislator_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vote */,
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislator */,
  "vote" TEXT /* The legislator's vote (e.g., yes, no, abstain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id", "legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governors" (
  "governor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the governor */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of their term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of their term */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the governor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the governor */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the governor's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("governor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governor_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "governor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the governor */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., signed, vetoed) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* The reason provided for the action (e.g., vetoed due to budget concerns) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the document explaining the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governor_actions_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governor_actions_governor_id FOREIGN KEY ("governor_id") REFERENCES governors ("governor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "newsletter_subscription" INTEGER /* Whether the user subscribes to the platform's newsletter */,
  "interests" TEXT /* A list of the user's interests (e.g., environmental justice, education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bill_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the public user */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "tracking_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started tracking the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bill_tracking_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES public_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bill_tracking_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact rating */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the bill's impact (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment by the user on the bill's impact */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "impact_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the user's impact rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_impact_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES public_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_impact_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news article (e.g., newspaper, online news site) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)
